query:
INSERT INTO products (establishmentId, categoryId, name, description, price, status, sortOrder, createdAt, updatedAt)
SELECT e.id, c.id, p.name, p.description, p.price, 'active', p.sortOrder, NOW(), NOW()
FROM establishments e
JOIN categories c ON c.establishmentId = e.id AND c.name = 'Bebidas'
CROSS JOIN (
  SELECT 'Coca-Cola 350ml' as name, 'Refrigerante Coca-Cola lata 350ml' as description, 7.90 as price, 1 as sortOrder UNION ALL
  SELECT 'Coca-Cola 600ml', 'Refrigerante Coca-Cola garrafa 600ml', 10.90, 2 UNION ALL
  SELECT 'Suco Natural', 'Suco natural de laranja, limão ou maracujá (400ml)', 12.90, 3 UNION ALL
  SELECT 'Milkshake', 'Milkshake cremoso de chocolate, morango ou ovomaltine (400ml)', 18.90, 4
) p
WHERE e.userId = 180577;
